title: Methods should not be too long
messageFormat: Method '{0}' contains {1} statements, above the limit of {2}.
summary: A method that stretches over many statements usually does several things at once, which makes it hard to name, test, and reason about. Counting the statements in a body is a blunt but reliable signal that a method has accreted more than one responsibility.
The statement limit is configurable so generated-style or table-driven bodies can be tuned.
